labs.clinicalContext: cardiovascular risk reduction and blood pressure management in patients with normal urine albumin excretion

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: appropriate for patients with normal urine albumin excretion; all 3 classes (RAS inhibitors, diuretics, and dihydropyridine CCBs) are often needed to attain blood pressure targets
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: dihydropyridine calcium channel blocker (CCB) or diuretic can also be considered; all 3 classes are often needed to attain blood pressure (BP) targets
